content:
Character: Rachel Kovacs
Perception: Rachel is a strong-looking young woman — broad shoulders, sharp eyes, carries herself like someone who learned early not to depend on others. She picks up takeout orders almost every week, always in a rush, always polite but guarded. Once I overheard her on the phone arguing about money in a tired voice that reminded me of my own early years. I left extra spring rolls in her bag without saying anything. I think she sees me as just the restaurant guy. I know she works multiple jobs and sends money home. I respect her deeply.

I think she sees me as just the restaurant guy. I know she works multiple jobs and sends money home. I respect her deeply.
